name: Citability API
description: Citability is a domain intelligence platform that measures AI visibility, citation readiness, and agentic commerce readiness across 607M domains. The API provides scanning, scoring, and enrichment endpoints for ADP (AI Discovery Protocol) compliance, llms.txt validation, Schema.org markup, MCP endpoint detection, and content extractability analysis.
